preamble.title: Andamio-Platform/plumbline-global-state
preamble.description: Aiken contracts used by the andamio protocol.

cardano/address/Address.title: Address
cardano/address/Address.description:
A Cardano `Address` typically holding one or two credential references.

 Note that legacy bootstrap addresses (a.k.a. 'Byron addresses') are
 completely excluded from Plutus contexts. Thus, from an on-chain
 perspective only exists addresses of type 00, 01, ..., 07 as detailed
 in [CIP-0019 :: Shelley Addresses](https://github.com/cardano-foundation/CIPs/tree/master/CIP-0019/#shelley-addresses).

cardano/address/Credential.title: Credential
cardano/address/Credential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/PaymentCredential.title: PaymentCredential
cardano/address/PaymentCredential.description:
A general structure for representing an on-chain `Credential`.

 Credentials are always one of two kinds: a direct public/private key
 pair, or a script (native or Plutus).

cardano/address/StakeCredential.title: StakeCredential
cardano/address/StakeCredential.description:
Represent a type of object that can be represented either inline (by hash)
 or via a reference (i.e. a pointer to an on-chain location).

 This is mainly use for capturing pointers to a stake credential
 registration certificate in the case of so-called pointer addresses.

plumbline/types/global_state/GlobalState.title: GlobalStateAction
plumbline/types/global_state/GlobalState.description: Action a user can perform on a global state.

anyOf.title: MintLocalState
anyOf.description: Mint a local state token and add it to global state.

fields.title: local_state_id
fields.description: identifier of a local state (nft policy id)

fields.title: local_state_index
fields.description: index where to find local state in global state pairs

fields.title: local_state_cs
fields.description: policy id of the state token in a local state (empty if not minted)

anyOf.title: BurnLocalState
anyOf.description: Burn a local state token and change data.

fields.title: local_state_id
fields.description: identifier of a local state (nft policy id)

fields.title: local_state_index
fields.description: index where to find local state in global state pairs

fields.title: local_state_cs
fields.description: policy id of the state token in a local state (empty if not minted)

anyOf.title: DeleteState
anyOf.description: Delete a local state from global state. Not possible if minted.

fields.title: local_state_id
fields.description: identifier of a local state (nft policy id)

fields.title: local_state_index
fields.description: index where to find local state in global state pairs

anyOf.title: MoveState
anyOf.description: Move global state to a new validator.

plumbline/types/global_state/GlobalState.title: GlobalStateDatum
plumbline/types/global_state/GlobalState.description: Global state of a user always attached to the global state token.

fields.title: alias
fields.description: Alias to identify user, no prefix.

fields.title: local_state_data
fields.description:
Each pair one local state. 
 `PolicyId` to identify local state.
 `ByteArray` data + local state token as blake2b_256 hash

fields.title: ls_id
fields.description: identifier of a local state (nft policy id)
